name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Corn starch, dissolved in ½ cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, minced onion, egg, soya sauce, salt and pepper together. Form the mixture into small meatballs no larger than 1 inch in diameter. Slice green pepper and tomato. Assemble other ingredients.
2. Heat oil in a wok to smoking point. Carefully place meatballs into the wok. Brown the meatballs thoroughly on all sides (about 12 minutes cooking time). Remove them to a serving platter. Pour the meat juices over the meatballs.
3. Wipe the wok clean of any residue with a piece of paper towel. Place 3 tablespoons brown sugar and 3 tablespoons cider vinegar in the wok. Cook until the sugar is dissolved. Add tomato, green pepper, and pineapple chunks to the wok. Cook everything for 3 minutes. Stir up the corn starch solution thoroughly. Add it to the wok, stirring everything well. Cook for another 2 or 3 minutes until the corn starch solution is clear instead of cloudy. Pour over the meatballs.
NOTE: Try to keep your meatballs as tiny as possible, as they will absorb the sweet and sour sauce better. The appearance of the dish will also be nicer.
